name: Coconut Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except coconut in the top of a double boiler. Beat for one minute to blend, then place over boiling water and beat with a rotary hand or electric beater until stiff peaks form, stirring the mixture up from the bottom and sides of the pan occasionally.
2. Transfer to a large bowl and beat for an additional minute, or until thick enough to spread.
3. Frost cake, then sprinkle generously with grated coconut.
4. Makes sufficient frosting for sides and top of 2 9-inch cake layers.
